description: Computes the difference of clippable shapes. Returns shape1 minus all subsequent shapes. Useful for creating cutouts, holes, and subtractive geometric designs.
utility: Remove one or more shapes from a base shape

arguments.name: shape1
arguments.description: Base shape from which others will be subtracted

alternates.description: Larger square with smaller square hole

examples.expression:
G = g2d()
R = rect(G, -5, -5, 10, 10)
C = circle(G, 3, 0, 0)
D = diff(G, R, C)

G = g2d()
S = square(G, 0, 0, 8)
S2 = square(G, 2, 2, 4)
D = diff(G, S, S2)

G = g2d()
R = rect(G, -6, -6, 12, 12)
C1 = circle(G, 2, -3, -3)
C2 = circle(G, 2, 3, 3)
D = diff(G, R, C1, C2)
